summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Módulo de Compras a Proveedores (Purchase Orders Module). Backend APIs are 100% functional with all purchase order operations working correctly including automatic stock updates and Kardex registration. Frontend has login integration issue preventing UI testing.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login form unable to complete authentication process - API calls failing with net::ERR_ABORTED

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API - GET /api/compras (List all purchase orders)
✅ Backend API - GET /api/compras/{id} (Get purchase order details)
✅ Backend API - POST /api/compras/{id}/recibir (Receive order & update stock)
✅ Stock Update - Automatic inventory increase when receiving orders
✅ Kardex Registration - Movement records created automatically
✅ IGV Calculation - 18% tax calculation working correctly
✅ Order Number Generation - Sequential OC-XXXXXXXX format
✅ Admin Permissions - Only admins can create/manage purchase orders
✅ Supplier Integration - Purchase orders linked to suppliers correctly
✅ Product Integration - Products added to orders with correct pricing
✅ Business Logic - Cannot receive already received orders
✅ Business Logic - Cannot delete received orders
✅ Business Logic - Cannot receive cancelled orders
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login authentication issue - API calls from browser are failing with net::ERR_ABORTED error. Backend APIs are working correctly via curl, but frontend cannot complete login process. This prevents testing of the Compras UI components. Check CORS configuration, frontend API client setup, or authentication flow.

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All purchase order APIs working perfectly
success_percentage.frontend: 0% - Cannot test due to login authentication issue
